raw_consumer_statement:
Summary : In XX/XX/2024 my Citi card details were stolen online resulting in multiple fraudulent charges. I disputed each charge, and Citi changed my card numbers as a result. Citi credited all but one charge and they and the vendor claim it's legitimate, but it is not. 

Details : - The amount in dispute is {$58.00} ( originally charged in Euros ). This charge occurred XX/XX/. 
- The charge is with XXXX, a video game company, for a video game download code. 
- Only my husband and I have access to the credit card. Neither one of us has been or is a gamer. 
- The Customer email included with the charge is not me and is not anyone I know. 
- The charge of {$58.00} is fraudulent. 
- I provided a written statement to Citi on XX/XX/2024, that this is a fraudulent charge. 
- Citi is choosing to believe the vendor over me as a client despite there being other fraudulent charges on the card at the same time and despite my written statement that this is fraudulent. 
- Citi notified me XX/XX/2024, that they were reversing and posting the charge to my account. 

I wish to file a complaint against Citi for not properly handling what is clearly a fraudulent charge.
